claudeVersionCheck.javaStatus: latest commit and tag present; commit message reports full mvnw verify green; no Node blocker found
claudeVersionCheck.note: Node had no Claude-authored commit after v2145; Java v1807 was the new sibling version visible during this check.

necessityProof.blockerResolved: After v2144 the pure-standard renderer subset was empty. The remaining renderers include h3/map/flatMap layouts, and several compact h3 renderers omit the blank line after section headings or omit the trailing newline, which the existing builder could not represent byte-identically.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: Subsequent controlled-read-only-shard-preview and production-readiness renderer batches can now migrate compact h3 reports through the shared builder without changing Markdown bytes.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The existing verificationReportBuilder is reused and extended with optional spacing controls instead of creating a second builder or copying another renderer helper family.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: The extension is limited to section body spacing and trailing newline preservation. It does not add new section semantics, routes, services, or evidence chains.

builderExtension.bodyLeadingBlankLine: Optional section-level flag; default keeps the existing canonical blank line after ## headings, false preserves compact legacy sections.
builderExtension.trailingNewline: Optional report-level flag; default keeps the existing trailing newline, false preserves legacy renderers that ended without one.
builderExtension.backwardCompatibility: Existing builder-backed renderers keep default behavior.

byteIdenticalProof.method: Captured pre-migration SHA-256 and length for five renderer outputs, migrated files, then re-rendered the same fixtures and compared hashes.
